appSettingsDialogHint: Theme, defaults, engines, diagnostics, and backup in one place.
appSettingsHotkeyPasteUrlGlobal: Paste URL (when focus is not in a text field)
appSettingsOpenDownloadsTab: Open Downloads tab for more options
appSettingsResetConfirmHint: Click again to reset all settings (window positions are kept).
appSettingsFfmpegErrorCopyFailed: Could not copy FFmpeg error details
appSettingsFfmpegErrorEmpty: No recent FFmpeg error has been captured yet.
appSettingsFfmpegErrorEmptyDetail: Run export, snapshot, extract frames, video sprite, batch start, or benchmark until it fails to populate this surface.
appSettingsPluginsHint: Current Variant A plugin manager for AviSynth/VapourSynth external script filters from the product spec. Installation comes from a local file and syncs back into the export settings immediately.
appSettingsSectionHintDefaults: Download folder and batch export output directory.
appSettingsSectionHintDependencies: Paths to ffmpeg, ffprobe, and yt-dlp; check for bundled engine updates.
appSettingsSectionHintSystem: Variant A system and recovery surfaces: the external script plugin manager, encoder benchmark, and recovery panels now live here without sending you back to the editor rail.
appSettingsTerminalHintsGuardHint: §8 terminal hints (839+465 scenarios): check:terminal-contract-hints-shards (14 downloads + 8 preview shards (22 files)); locales:terminal-summaries-ru in check:quiet; Help: check:help-terminal-hints-docs (22 articles; 14 downloads + 8 preview shards (22 files)); Support ZIP: check:support-bundle-terminal-hints.
ownerHardwareChecklistThemeHeader: owner: VELORIX NEON / single-ui canon (not CI)
ownerHardwareChecklistThemeUiLine: canon: docs/VELORIX_NEON_THEME.md; hardware — Support ZIP ownerHardwareChecklist:; legacy theme controls are transitional only until cleanup
ownerHardwareChecklistHidpiUiLine: canon: docs/VELORIX_NEON_THEME.md; hardware — Support ZIP ownerHardwareChecklist:; scale — OS display settings
appSettingsSectionHintGeneral: Language, display scale (HiDPI), and URL paste behavior.
appSettingsHidpiActiveTier: Active CSS rules for {percent}% (@{dpi}dpi block in main.css)
appSettingsSectionHintHotkeys: Accelerators from the main menu (may differ on macOS).
appSettingsSectionHintLogs: Open logs, create a support archive, or open About for more tools.
appSettingsSectionHintReset: Export or import settings.json, or reset to factory defaults.
appSettingsConfirmCloseHint: Ask before closing the main window (active export or download still shows a separate warning).
settingsEnginesCheckUpdatesTooltip: Compare yt-dlp and FFmpeg versions with GitHub and download to app-data/bin when newer
appSettingsExplorerMenuHint: Add Open in Velorix and Quick MP4 for video files (current user, HKCU). Portable builds: register manually.
appSettingsExplorerMenuRegisteredStatus: Menu entries are registered for video extensions
appSettingsOpenWithHint: Adds Velorix to the Open with list for video files (HKCU). Does not set a default app — use Windows Settings for that.
appSettingsOpenWithRegisteredStatus: Velorix is listed in Open with for video extensions
appSettingsThemeManualHint: Single-NEON UI checklist — docs/VELORIX_NEON_THEME.md; hardware — Support ZIP ownerHardwareChecklist: (not in app UI).
appSettingsHidpiManualHint: HiDPI checklist — docs/VELORIX_NEON_THEME.md; hardware — Support ZIP ownerHardwareChecklist: (not in app UI).
appSettingsThemeCheckWorkflow: scenario builder / planner on NEON tokens
